title: Bulk Status Update
subtitle: {count, plural, one {Update status for # selected order} other {Update status for # selected orders}}

form.notesPlaceholder: Add notes about this status change...
form.confirmationMessage: {count, plural, one {You are about to update # order to status: {status}} other {You are about to update # orders to status: {status}}}

results.successMessage: {successCount, plural, one {Successfully updated # order} other {Successfully updated # orders}}
results.successWithFailures: {successCount, plural, one {Successfully updated # order • {failureCount} failed} other {Successfully updated # orders • {failureCount} failed}}

errors.tooManyOrders: Cannot update more than 100 orders at once
